title: Puck (A Midsummer Night's Dream)
content: Puck, or Robin Goodfellow, is a character in William Shakespeare's play, "A Midsummer Night's Dream". Based on the Puck of English mythology, Puck is a mischievous fairy, sprite, or jester. He is the first of the main fairy characters to appear, and he significantly influences events in the play. He delights in pranks such as replacing Bottom's head with that of an ass. Appearances in the play.
